betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Tiered, wearable backpack storage with a modular upgrade system. Progress from Basic to Diamond tier, choosing between Storage and Upgrade specialties, and customize with functional upgrades.

Progression:
    Basic Backpack - Entry-level 18-slot storage
    Tiered Upgrades - Iron, Gold, Diamond tiers with specialties
    Backpack Upgrades - Functional modules for automation
